conventions.name: Publication Sync Checklist
conventions.description: When creating or updating a publication/story/page, sync changes across all required points.
checklist: Redirect HTML: index.html alongside each index.md (4 files)
DOCS array: docs/index.html viewer DOCS[] entry with path + path_fr
Navigator EN: docs/interfaces/main-navigator/index.md (T keys + pubs list)
Front matter: og_image, live_webcard if applicable
